MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: L. Fiscella; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Steven Woo is present.
STanley Shen, Esq. appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Stephanie Frost is present.
Timothy Moppin, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem Adrian Colley, litigants and counsel confer in Department 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of MAR-30-2015 is vacated.
